data.name: Sarah Chen
data.title: UI/UX Designer & Brand Strategist
data.bio:
I design digital products and brand systems that turn complexity into clarity. My process combines deep user research, rigorous product thinking, and visual storytelling.

Over the last decade, I have partnered with startups and enterprise teams to launch experiences that are elegant, accessible, and measurable.
data.description: Independent product designer focused on SaaS, fintech, and ecommerce experiences.

data.testimonial_1_quote: Sarah elevated our product and our brand in one engagement.
data.testimonial_2_quote: Her design thinking accelerated our roadmap decisions.
data.testimonial_3_quote: Exceptional craft and strong collaboration with engineering.
data.testimonial_4_quote: She turns ambiguous goals into clear, testable solutions.
